headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Caesars Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $34
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $32 to $34.
